positive: A majestic, symmetrical arrangement featuring bioluminescent cosmic florals and crystalline geometric patterns intersecting with delicate woodland fauna. The central composition showcases ethereal glowing mushrooms growing around a stylized crescent moon and intertwining with glowing vines. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets cosmic minimalism. Strong contrast with deep midnight blues, vivid teal, lavender, and accents of glowing gold. Composition: Central, highly detailed, suitable for full-chest print placement, rendered as a negative-space silhouette with clean, defined edges. Lighting: Dramatic, ethereal glow emanating from the flora, giving a backlit, deep-space quality. Intricate linework, vector illustration quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, low contrast, text, watermark, logo, brand, signature, multiple subjects, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, noise, grain, jpeg artifacts, low detail, writing, cropped, poorly drawn
